auth.loginSub: Welcome back. Enter your details to continue.
auth.registerSub: Sign up to access the platform.
auth.checkEmailBody: We've sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link to activate your account and sign in.
auth.errorEmailInUse: An account with this email already exists.
auth.heroTitle: Run your entire cleaning operation in one place.
auth.heroBody: Scheduling, time tracking, property records, invoicing — everything your team needs, from field to office.
auth.feature1Body: See every shift, property and employee at a glance.
auth.feature2Body: Accurate time tracking from the job site itself.
auth.feature3Body: Direct Lexware sync — paperwork takes care of itself.
auth.mfaSub: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
auth.mfaWrongCode: That code didn't work. Try again.

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: Here is your operations overview for today.

mine.title: My profile — Hello {name}
mine.subtitle: Hours, vacation and mandatory training at a glance.

picker.title: Which type of customer is this?
picker.intro: First, choose the service area. This determines the billing method, the assignable staff, and the color used throughout the app. Changes later require management approval.
picker.priyaColor: Green throughout the app · existing behaviour
picker.alltagsCustomers: Via health insurance · the insurer is the payer
picker.alltagsColor: Red on clients, properties and staff
picker.hint: Unsure? Ask the customer who pays. If it's a health insurer, choose Alltagshilfe.

clients.title: Clients
clients.subtitle: Manage all client accounts, contracts and properties.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, contact or address…

table.gridSoon: Grid view coming next iteration. Switch to list view.

detail.contactsAddComingSoon: Contacts are managed in the section below.
detail.archiveConfirm: Archive this client? They will no longer appear in the active list.

contacts.title: Contact persons
contacts.subtitle: Everyone who can be reached at this client.

properties.title: Properties
properties.subtitle: All sites under active service. Linked to clients, teams and recurring schedules.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by property, address, or client…

detail.deleteConfirm: Delete this property? Linked shifts are kept.

form.createSubtitle: Capture the site details and link to a client.
form.name: Property name
form.accessCodePlaceholder: e.g. front door PIN, alarm code
form.restrictedAreasPlaceholder: e.g. server room not entered, archive locked

cleaningConcept.title: Cleaning concept
cleaningConcept.subtitle: PDF document outlining tasks, frequencies, and standards.

photos.title: Photos
photos.subtitle: {count} photos · internal documentation
photos.emptyBody: Upload via the button top right.
photos.limitReached: Limit is 20 photos per property — {dropped} were dropped.

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subtitle: All field assignments across teams, clients and properties.

actions.confirmCancel: Cancel this shift? The row stays visible for audit.
actions.confirmDelete: Delete this shift permanently? This cannot be undone.

sidebar.teamEmpty: No staffed shifts in this week.

dialog.title: Plan shift
dialog.subtitle: Set property, staff member and time range.

list.title: All shifts
list.empty: No shifts match the current filters.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: All team members. Manage roles, teams, working time and availability.

toolbar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, role, or team…

role.changeConfirm: Choose a new role for {name}. The change applies immediately.
role.changeSelf: You cannot change your own role. Ask another administrator.

detail.deleteConfirm: Remove this employee? Their shifts are kept.

dialog.createSubtitle: Capture profile data and working hours.

reports.title: Reports & exports
reports.subtitle: Financial and operational reports across clients, properties and teams

library.title: Report library
library.subtitle: {count} standard reports · run on demand or schedule recurring

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.subtitle: All invoices with status filter and Lexware sync.

actions.newComingSoon: Manual create coming soon — invoices are generated from shifts.

statement.title: Client statement
statement.subtitle: Invoices, payments and outstanding balance per client.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Workspace, team, tax, integrations and localization.

company.title: 01 · Company profile
company.subtitle: Legal identity, brand and locations used on invoices, emails and the client portal.

tax.title: 03 · Tax & billing
tax.subtitle: VAT, invoice defaults and subscription plan.

integrations.title: 04 · Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect third-party services to sync schedules, payments and exports.

notifications.title: 05 · Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Who gets notified about what — per channel.

push.title: Web Push notifications
push.subtitle: Get a desktop or mobile alert even when the app is closed.
push.bodyUnsupported: This browser doesn't support Web Push.
push.bodyDenied: You blocked notifications. Enable them in your browser settings, then reload.
push.bodyMissingVapid: Push isn't configured on the server. Add VAPID keys to enable.
push.bodyOn: You'll receive push notifications on this device.
push.bodyOff: Turn on to receive notifications from this device's browser.

security.title: 07 · Security
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication (TOTP) and session protection.
security.twoFactorBody: Adds protection for management and project-manager accounts.
security.scanCode: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (1Password, Authy, Google Authenticator).
security.verifyTitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
security.loginChallengeBody: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code.

locale.title: 06 · Localization
locale.subtitle: Language, timezone, currency and week start.

lexware.title: Monthly Lexware billing
lexware.subtitle: Generate monthly invoices from completed shifts and push them to Lexware Office.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: All system events, reminders and schedule changes.

vacation.title: Vacation
vacation.subtitle: Request, review and approve time off.

form.title: Request vacation
form.subtitle: Pick a date range and add a reason.

composer.recordUnsupported: Voice recording isn't supported in this browser.

channels.emptyGroups: Create a group for ad-hoc topics.

page.title: Team chat
page.subtitle: Direct exchange with your team — channels for schedule, care, finance, and 1:1 messages.
page.emptyBody: Each property gets its own channel automatically. Direct messages start from a teammate's profile.

damage.title: Damage & incident reports
damage.subtitle: Track issues observed on this property — notes, problems and damages.
damage.modalSubtitle: Describe what you found. Add photos when helpful.
damage.descriptionPlaceholder: What did you see? Where? When?
damage.discussTitle: Open this report in the property chat channel
damage.limitReached: Limit is 20 photos per report — {dropped} were dropped.

type.title: What kind of client?
type.subtitle: Pick the option that best fits this customer.
type.alltagshilfeDesc: Care service — billed to health insurer.

client.title: Contact details
client.subtitle: Who should we get in touch with?

address.title: Where is the property?
address.subtitle: Used to create the first property record. Optional.
address.optional: You can skip this and add properties later.

service.title: Service preferences
service.subtitle: How often, on which day?
service.notes: Special requests, key handover notes, allergies…

review.title: Review and sign
review.subtitle: Check the details and sign below to finish onboarding.
review.name: Name

signature.heading: Customer signature
signature.body: By signing below, the customer confirms the details above are correct and consents to data processing.
signature.consent: I have read and accept the data processing terms.

signature.hint: Use your finger or a stylus.

success.title: All done!
success.body: The client has been onboarded successfully. The signed agreement is on file.

photos.title: Photo documentation
photos.subtitle: Capture the property's current state during the first visit.
photos.limitReached: Limit is 20 photos per property — {dropped} were dropped.

training.title: Training & onboarding
training.subtitle: Watch the modules, mark them complete as you go.
training.selectModule: Select a module on the left.

assign.title: Assign module
assign.subtitle: Choose who should see and complete "{module}".
assign.visibility: When 0 selected, the module stays visible to everyone (shared). When ≥1, only those {n} see it.
assign.skippedNoProfile: {n} without app account — saved, but not notified.
assign.noProfileTooltip: This employee has no app login yet and won't receive an in-app notification.

editor.title: Title
editor.videoUrlHint: YouTube, Vimeo, or a direct .mp4 URL.

training.completeWithSignatureBody: Sign below to confirm you completed this mandatory training module.

errors.signatureRequired: A signature is required to complete this mandatory module.
errors.signatureTooLarge: Signature is too large. Please try again with a simpler signature.

alltagshilfeReport.bannerBody: at month-end · Used by Priya's team to issue the manual invoice to the health insurer — not directly to the client.
alltagshilfeReport.title: Monthly report
alltagshilfeReport.subtitle: Hours delivered per Alltagshilfe client · ready for manual invoicing
alltagshilfeReport.kpiStaffSub: All certificates valid for the period
alltagshilfeReport.breakdownSubtitle: Grouped by care recipient · staff and visits detailed below each group

import.title: Import {module} from CSV
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV file. We validate every row before importing.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Issue keys for integrations to read or write data through the public REST API.
apiKeys.createDialogSubtitle: Choose a name and scopes. The key is shown once on the next screen — copy it somewhere safe.
apiKeys.secretShownOnce: Copy this key now. We hash and discard the value on our side — once you close this dialog it cannot be shown again.
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? Integrations using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.emptyState: No API keys yet. Create one to let an integration access this organisation.

offline.title: You're offline
offline.body: We can't reach the network right now. Your work is safe — anything you change while offline will sync automatically when you're back online.
offline.availableBody: Reading recent clients, properties, shifts, and cached dashboard data.
offline.queuedBody: Creating or editing records — your changes are queued and will replay when you reconnect.

assignments.title: Assignments
assignments.subtitle: Property × client × planned hours × hourly rate with staff allocation.

alltagshilfeBudget.title: Entlastungsbetrag {year}
alltagshilfeBudget.subtitle: § 45b SGB XI · annual budget
alltagshilfeBudget.alert100: ⛔ Annual budget depleted. Further charges are not reimbursable.

invoiceNew.title: New invoice
invoiceNew.subtitle: Pick a client and a billing period. The system aggregates all approved time entries in that range into a draft invoice.
